phone  
the task is to calculate the total points scored by samford university's football team during a memorable season.  
the core subject is the team's performance in 12 games, with wins and losses.  
constraints include 12 games, no ties, and point averages for wins and losses.  
the required output is the total points scored.  
phone  
the team won twice as many games as they lost, so they won 6 games and lost 6 games.  
phone  
the average points per game for wins is 28, so 6 games × 28 = 168 points.  
phone  
the average points per game for losses is 14, so 6 games × 14 = 84 points.  
phone  
total points scored = 168 + 84 = 252 points.  
the pen is mightier than sword.  
the pen is mightier than sword.
